title: centaurium virescens
intro: Centaurium virescens, also known as mountain fleabane or white centaury, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the gentian family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Centaurium virescens include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Centaurium virescens is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, which can be used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
